zh.lifeSummary: 當Johann  I der Theologe von Mecklenburg於1202年出生在德國梅可倫波-沃爾包莫史維林史維林時，他的父親Prince Heinrich II Burwin of Mecklenburg33歲，母親Kristina Sverkersdotter17歲。他於1230年與Luitgard of Henneberg在德國梅可倫波-沃爾包莫史維林史維林結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1264年8月1日在德國梅可倫波-沃爾包莫可萊斯 諾爾德維斯特米可倫波格多福 梅可倫波格梅可倫波格享年62歲，埋葬在德國福萊斯塔阿特 梅可倫波-史維林斯塔特 多朗。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Johann  I der Theologe von Mecklenburg于1202年出生在德国梅可倫波-沃爾包莫史維林史維林时，他的父亲Prince Heinrich II Burwin of Mecklenburg33岁，母亲Kristina Sverkersdotter17岁。他于1230年与Luitgard of Henneberg在德国梅可倫波-沃爾包莫史維林史維林结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1264年8月1日在德国梅可倫波-沃爾包莫可萊斯 諾爾德維斯特米可倫波格多福 梅可倫波格梅可倫波格享年62岁，埋葬在德国福萊斯塔阿特 梅可倫波-史維林斯塔特 多朗。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Mecklenburg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from the province of this name in northern Germany, so called from Old Saxon mikil ‘big, great’ + burg ‘castle’. Amongst Jews this may have been acquired alternatively as an artificial name.

variants.name: Mekelburg
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Gerhard, Helmut.
German: variant of Meckelburg, itself a variant of Mecklenburg .

nameMeanings.name: Johann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

nameMeanings.name: der
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Johann  I der Theologe von Mecklenburg was born in 1202, in Schwerin, Schwerin, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Germany, his father, Prince Heinrich II Burwin of Mecklenburg, was 33 and his mother, Kristina Sverkersdotter, was 17. He married Luitgard of Henneberg in 1230, in Schwerin, Schwerin, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Germany. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 1 August 1264, in Mecklenburg, Dorf Mecklenburg, Kreis Nordwestmecklenburg, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Germany, at the age of 62, and was buried in Doberan, Mecklenburg-Schwerin, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Johann  I der Theologe von Mecklenburg est né en 1202, à Schwerin, Schwerin, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Allemagne, son père, Prince Heinrich II Burwin of Mecklenburg, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Kristina Sverkersdotter, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Luitgard of Henneberg en 1230, à Schwerin, Schwerin, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 1 août 1264, à Mecklenburg, Dorf Mecklenburg, Kreis Nordwestmecklenburg, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Allemagne, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Stadt Doberan, Freistaat Mecklenburg-Schwerin, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Johann  I der Theologe von Mecklenburg 1202 in Schwerin, Schwerin, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Prince Heinrich II Burwin of Mecklenburg 33 und seine Mutter Kristina Sverkersdotter 17. Er hat 1230 in Schwerin, Schwerin, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Deutschland Luitgard of Henneberg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 1. August 1264 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Mecklenburg, Dorf Mecklenburg, Kreis Nordwestmecklenburg, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Deutschland und wurde in Stadt Doberan, Freistaat Mecklenburg-Schwerin, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Johann  I der Theologe von Mecklenburg è nato il nel 1202 nel Schwerin, Schwerin, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Germania, il suo padre, Prince Heinrich II Burwin of Mecklenburg, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Kristina Sverkersdotter, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Luitgard of Henneberg nel 1230, nel Schwerin, Schwerin, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 1 agosto 1264, nel Mecklenburg, Dorf Mecklenburg, Kreis Nordwestmecklenburg, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Germania, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Stadt Doberan, Freistaat Mecklenburg-Schwerin, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Johann  I der Theologe von Mecklenburgが1202年にドイツメックレンブルグ-ボルプオンメルンスチウエリンスチウエリンで生まれた時，父Prince Heinrich II Burwin of Mecklenburgは33歳，母Kristina Sverkersdotterは17歳であった。1230年にドイツメックレンブルグ-ボルプオンメルンスチウエリンスチウエリンでLuitgard of Hennebergと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1264年8月1日にドイツメックレンブルグ-ボルプオンメルンクレイス ノードウエストメックレンブルグドールフ メックレンブルグメックレンブルグで62歳で死去し，ドイツフレイスタアト メックレンブルグ-スチウエリンスタト ドバーアンにて埋葬された。

ko.Mecklenburg, Nordwestmecklenburg, Meckle: 독일 클렌버그-보르폼머 크레이스 노르드베스트클렌버그 도르프 클렌버그 클렌버그
ko.lifeSummary: Johann  I der Theologe von Mecklenburg(이)가 1202년 독일 클렌버그-보르폼머 슈워인 슈워인에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Prince Heinrich II Burwin of Mecklenburg(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Kristina Sverkersdotter(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1230년 독일 클렌버그-보르폼머 슈워인 슈워인에서 Luitgard of Henneberg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1264년 8월 1일 독일 클렌버그-보르폼머 크레이스 노르드베스트클렌버그 도르프 클렌버그 클렌버그에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 프레이스타앳 클렌버그-슈워인 스타드트 도베란에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Johann  I der Theologe von Mecklenburg nasceu em 1202, em Schwerin, Schwerin, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Alemanha, seu pai, Prince Heinrich II Burwin of Mecklenburg, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Kristina Sverkersdotter, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Luitgard of Henneberg em 1230, em Schwerin, Schwerin, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1 de agosto de 1264, em Mecklenburg, Dorf Mecklenburg, Kreis Nordwestmecklenburg, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Alemanha, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Stadt Doberan, Freistaat Mecklenburg-Schwerin, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Johann  I der Theologe von Mecklenburg родился в 1202 г. в местности щвирин, щвирин, меккленбург-ворпоммирн, Германия, его отцу по имени Prince Heinrich II Burwin of Mecklenburg было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Kristina Sverkersdotter, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Luitgard of Henneberg в 1230 г. в местности щвирин, щвирин, меккленбург-ворпоммирн, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 1 августа 1264 г. в местности меккленбург, дорф меккленбург, крис нордвестмеккленбург, меккленбург-ворпоммирн, Германия в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности стадт добиран, фристаат меккленбург-щвирин, Германия.

es.Mecklenburg, Nordwestmecklenburg, Meckle: Mecklenburg, Dorf Mecklenburg, Kreis Nordwestmecklenburg, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Alemania
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Johann  I der Theologe von Mecklenburg nació en 1202, en Schwerin, Schwerin, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Alemania, su papá, Prince Heinrich II Burwin of Mecklenburg, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Kristina Sverkersdotter, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Luitgard of Henneberg en 1230, en Schwerin, Schwerin, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 1 de agosto de 1264, en Mecklenburg, Dorf Mecklenburg, Kreis Nordwestmecklenburg, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Alemania, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Stadt Doberan, Freistaat Mecklenburg-Schwerin, Alemania.
